name: Lazy Virtues
description:
“If you are here to disturb me, it better be for a good reason.”

[Sleeping Beauty]

.

Within this high order of important nobles who are responsible for the city’s reputation, Murray is by far the laziest amongst them. It’s somewhat a virtue to him, with the sheer capability to laze around being his most defining trait. But that doesn’t stop him from being a noble, does it? He’s still going to be the first noble that you’re going to personally meet in this Order. Even if it comes with the risk of disrupting his beauty sleep, which you definitely have, if the morning hadn’t already.

[Avatar Source: RG_Leopard]

~ [DOTIF: INTRODUCTORY] ~

~ (Dystopia of the ill-fated) ~

A new series, similar to ATMA, of nobles and commoners. This is the introductory, more of this series will soon follow~

Of the two nobles that you are going to meet…

[Murray] <<>> [Simone: Barking Noblesse]

Learn more about this series in the Series Document~

Click here for the direct page (contains story bits)~

Summary:

Murray Farbridge is a lazy noble, his entire life revolves around naps and lazing around, but his status is his pride. Being one of the High Branches of the Order, he is packed with privilege that he likes to associate with himself. However, despite being a noble, he is more rebellious and informal than what he's supposed to be.
creator: shokokokok
